narrative:
Newark Twp township has 1,874 registered voters, with 50.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.3 percentage points.
